name: Milkyway Center — V131 Silicon Photonic Chip
description: V131 silicon photonic chip: topological manifold processor on SOI with 2^363 crystal manifold, 80-channel DWDM, ~120 PFLOPS projected. Plus hardware-validated 1.4ns deterministic photonic cipher with 0/40 anti-spoofing. BER=0, 3/3 tapeout PASS, 9/9 cipher tests PASS.

skills.name: V131 Silicon Photonic Chip Tapeout
skills.description: Topological manifold processor on SOI: 2^363 crystal manifold, 80ch C-band DWDM, TiN thermo-optic phase shifters, FPGA real-time decode, BER=0 verified, 3/3 tapeout sign-off PASS. ~120 PFLOPS projected at 50 GBaud, ~12,000 TOPS/W efficiency.

skills.name: V131 Hardware Validation — Photonic Cipher
skills.description: 9/9 hardware tests passed on real 30m fiber: dual-layer photonic cipher with 1.4ns deterministic encryption, 99.75% perfect frame rate, 0/40 anti-spoofing, AES-256-CTR NIST compliant. FPGA-native physical-layer security for HFT and critical infrastructure.

skills.name: V131 Protocol Licensing
skills.description: Licensing information for V131 silicon photonic chip and cipher technology: strategic (institutional), industrial (commercial), and research (academic) tiers.
